title: Enda (Ena enderman)
description: A pack that makes enderman entity look like "Ena" from Ena series by Joel G
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** (pack fully made by [me](https://modrinth.com/user/radok_main))

A resource pack that replaces an enderman into 3 expressions of Ena [ƎNA] by [Joel g](https://www.youtube.com/joelg) from original series (inspired by a [post](https://www.reddit.com/r/ENA/comments/1mkwb4s/ena_but_in_minecraft) on reddit)
